description: Historical Orbit Wars champion/opponent registry for future full-step local and Daytona gauntlets. This is inventory only; it does not run matches.

entries.description: v3: wide search plus forecast-aware target ranking; strongest known local historical public-score anchor from the visible submission list.
entries.name: claude-v3-wide-search-forecast

entries.description: v28: mode-split champion with no-leak gate and 2p pinning / 4p pessimism gate.
entries.name: claude-v28-mode-split-champion

entries.description: v37: race-fix plus 2p opportunism window plus mode-split gates.
entries.name: claude-v37-race-fix-mode-split

entries.description: v14: hammer-discipline variant kept as a style hedge against the historical top cluster.
entries.name: claude-v14-hammer-discipline

entries.description: v8: leader-weighted denial in FFA plus mode-aware neutral response discount.
entries.name: claude-v8-leader-weighted-denial

entries.description: v9: hold-aware capture sizing with counter-snipe deterrence.
entries.name: claude-v9-hold-aware-capture

entries.description: v31: race-awareness plus seat tie-break on mode-split base.
entries.name: claude-v31-race-awareness

entries.description: v62 bundled: low-pickoff veto bundled champion.
entries.name: claude-v62-low-pickoff-bundled

entries.description: Historical claude main.py bundled from v62.py; retained because existing smoke benchmarks already use it.
entries.name: claude-main-v62-bundled

entries.description: orbit-wars-2 frozen current main from the prior local smoke benchmark; public submission ref not recorded.
entries.name: ow2-current-main

entries.description: orbit-wars-2 frozen v11 wide-search agent from the prior local smoke benchmark; public submission ref not recorded.
entries.name: ow2-v11-wide-search

entries.description: Original orbit-wars round7 played baseline; kept as known historical candidate but skipped until loader compatibility is fixed.
entries.name: ow-round7-opponent-shadow-played-baseline
entries.skip_reason: Existing file raises AttributeError during current python_file harness loading; do not force it into gauntlet until loader compatibility is addressed.

entries.description: Original orbit-wars round8 wide-shadow switch candidate; kept as known historical candidate but skipped until loader compatibility is fixed.
entries.name: ow-round8-wide-shadow-switch
entries.skip_reason: Existing file raises AttributeError during current python_file harness loading; do not force it into gauntlet until loader compatibility is addressed.

entries.description: Original orbit-wars quick swarm expander; visible historical score reached 600.0 but loader compatibility is currently blocked.
entries.name: ow-quick-swarm-expander
entries.skip_reason: Existing file raises AttributeError during current python_file harness loading; do not force it into gauntlet until loader compatibility is addressed.

metadata.source_policy: Use historical agents only as external python_file opponents; do not copy their source into orbit-wars-serious.

name: historical-champion-registry
